Stub functions for handling Bluetooth Low Energy advertising connections and disconnections as a slave.

# Purpose
This code is a C header file that declares two functions related to Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE) advertising. The function [`gap_le_advert_handle_connect_as_slave`](<#gap_le_advert_handle_connect_as_slave>) is intended to handle events when a connection is established as a slave device. The function [`gap_le_advert_handle_disconnect_as_slave`](<#gap_le_advert_handle_disconnect_as_slave>) is intended to handle events when a disconnection occurs as a slave device. Both functions are currently empty, indicating that the specific handling logic needs to be implemented. The `#pragma once` directive is used to ensure the file is included only once in a single compilation, preventing duplicate definitions.
